title: Tirac Munda

'''Tirac Munda''' was an astronomical object<ref name="CCG" /> located in the [[Tirac Munda system/Legends|Tirac Munda system]], a part of the [[Hevvrol sector/Legends|Hevvrol sector]] in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="Trailing Sectors" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Thief/Legends|thief]] [[Merc Sunlet]].<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tirac Munda was first mentioned on a card for Merc Sunlet from the [[1996]] ''[[A New Hope Limited]]'' expansion of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Tirac Munda [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Tirac Munda itself, in grid square P-15.<ref name="TEA" />
